ground_truth: INFERRED. This export is a SUPERSET — the same room held BOTH the Difficult and the Normal run (84 encounters), so it contains ~2 clears of each boss + the early Calanthia attempts. Weak/overlapping test vs ZUY5-Difficult; AXEP is the independent one.
notes: Both runs in one room: 2 Dragaryle clears, 2 Constructs clears, 3 Calanthia (early attempts + 2 clears). Same party (union 3, andilex dark).
INFERRED key (no video). +1 group-count tolerance, union>=expected. Because it overlaps the Difficult run, treat a green here as confirmation, not independent evidence.
